items.brief: Largest stablecoins ranked; market cap surges to $300 billion
items.why: Stablecoins now recognized as efficient medium of exchange in financial system.

items.brief: Mirae rebrands Korbit exchange to connect RWAs, stablecoins, digital assets
items.why: Digital platform building ecosystem bridging RWAs and stablecoins together.

items.brief: How stablecoins maintain their peg through reserves and arbitrage
items.why: Explains mechanisms underlying stablecoin stability and value preservation.

items.brief: Tassat launches marketplace for stablecoin issuers and regional bank reserves
items.why: Infrastructure enabling smaller banks to participate in stablecoin ecosystem.

items.brief: Uniswap adds permissioned pools for regulated tokenized assets and securities
items.why: Trading infrastructure for tokenized regulated funds and securities.

items.brief: Goldman Sachs CEO backs Clarity Act stablecoin regulatory framework
items.why: Major bank support for stablecoin regulation creates clearer market structure.

items.brief: LayerZero and Keeta enable tokenized bank deposits across multiple blockchains
items.why: Cross-chain infrastructure for tokenized deposit products.

items.brief: Lombard launches bitcoin-backed credit strategy for stablecoin borrowing
items.why: New collateral mechanism for stablecoin lending products.

items.brief: Mubadala tokenizes private market fund onchain with Coinbase backing
items.why: Sovereign wealth fund tokenizing alternative assets on blockchain.

items.brief: Circle partners with Kakao and Toss Bank for South Korea stablecoin payments
items.why: Stablecoin payment infrastructure deployment with regional partners.
